article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer define his trajectory.
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid emerges as a prominent figure in the Mexican electronic music scene, known for his work in moombahton and dancehall and collaborations with major industry names.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his collaborations with prominent figures in the music industry, including DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
His production style is characterized by an innovative blend of moombahton and dancehall elements, establishing him as a notable contributor to the evolving electronic music landscape.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which features a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums used across his projects.
His work is further contextualized by his associations with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, all of whom contribute to the dynamic electronic music scene.
